Sprout: The Des Moines Urban Youth Learning Garden at Drake University, 30th St &, Carpenter Ave, Des Moines, IA 50311, USA

Drake University's Sprout Garden. This is a teaching space run as a partnership between Drake and the Burt Boys and Girls Club at Drake University. There are numerous berry plants and trees around the site (trees are north of the fenced garden area). Passersby
Falling Fruit access: Permitted by owner.
